segments.text: okay so what I'm thinking here is chin is a key point it's the already we have a hard- shaped face but there's a little bit of a junction between the cheek and the chin that makes the chin look a little bit lonely sometimes so I just want to harmonize that and make this one smooth continuous shape which involves a little bit of volume here maybe a little bit mental crease not very much then this key Point underneath the mandibular ligament at the mandibular ligament you get a little Junction and if I can blend that in it'll help um I don't actually I was wondering about adding volume here but it looks like there's reasonable volume here already so I can't do a lot I might be able to do a little bit just on the gonial angle so it's this point um and then blending the chin in up here that will make the lower face look a little bit more confluent [Music]
[Music] just going to that Junction point

[Music] now when I massage there I also just squeezed that product slightly in the direction I wanted to be that looks straight now the oral kisi here is very hard because there's a lot of it's essentially the end point of lots of changes so you directly treating it helps but it's never completely the final [Music] answer so gently in very little resistance which is good it sometimes isn't like that in this area you get either in the wrong layer or just a bit of adhesion so I'm up to the oral Kiser and I'm just trying to support the

oral Kiser this will make it easier when we come to directly treat this area that there's a bit of support underneath [Music] right underneath where the chin is defined as separate from the cheek [Music] here now we just go slightly above the chin mental [Music] crease this little fatat here underneath the lateral [Music] lip same again just massaging just to keep this straight

[Music] help that you smile again for me so maybe this little crease here is quite important aesthetically if I can get that to not come out then she'll Blossom more when she smiles [Music] smile again much [Music]

better so I went a bit more superficial there in the dermis to strengthen that bit more that's worked let's do this little line here chin strap lines often come out disproportionately well compared with other lines don't know what it is but they just like to come out [Music]
